soulbound.gui.title: Soulbound
soulbound.gui.reset_confirm: Reset all attributes and refund a portion of spent souls?
soulbound.command.reload: Reloaded caps configuration from persistent config
soulbound.configuration.strengthCap.tool: Maximum Strength attribute value players can reach through upgrades.
soulbound.configuration.healthCap.toolti: Maximum Health attribute value players can reach through upgrades.
soulbound.configuration.speedCap.tooltip: Maximum Speed attribute value players can reach through upgrades.
soulbound.configuration.armorCap.tooltip: Maximum Armor attribute value players can reach through upgrades.
soulbound.configuration.luckCap.tooltip: Maximum Luck attribute value players can reach through upgrades.
soulbound.configuration.strengthFlatPerL: Flat damage added per Strength level (before tier break). 1.0 = +1 attack damage.
soulbound.configuration.strengthPercentP: Percent attack damage bonus per Strength level (before tier break), as decimal. 0.03 = +3%.
soulbound.configuration.strengthTierBrea: Level at which Strength switches to later-tier  0 to disable tiering.
soulbound.configuration.strengthFlatPerL: Flat damage added per Strength level after tier break.
soulbound.configuration.strengthPercentP: Percent attack damage bonus per Strength level after tier break, as decimal.
soulbound.configuration.healthFlatPerLev: Flat max health added per Health level. 2.0 = +1 heart.
soulbound.configuration.healthPercentPer: Percent max health bonus per Health level, as decimal.
soulbound.configuration.speedFlatPerLeve: Flat movement speed added per Speed level.
soulbound.configuration.speedPercentPerL: Percent movement speed bonus per Speed level, as decimal. 0.01 = +1%.
soulbound.configuration.armorFlatPerLeve: Flat armor added per Armor level (before tier break).
soulbound.configuration.armorPercentPerL: Percent armor bonus per Armor level (before tier break), as decimal. 0.04 = +4%.
soulbound.configuration.armorTierBreak.t: Level at which Armor switches to later-tier  0 to disable tiering.
soulbound.configuration.armorFlatPerLeve: Flat armor added per Armor level after tier break.
soulbound.configuration.armorPercentPerL: Percent armor bonus per Armor level after tier break, as decimal.
soulbound.configuration.luckFlatPerLevel: Flat Luck attribute points added per Luck level.
soulbound.configuration.luckPercentPerLe: Percent luck bonus per Luck level, as decimal.
